subcategory: SVG pattern generator for funnel charts
use_cases: Creating reusable SVG line patterns for funnel chart visualizations
Generating diagonal, horizontal, or vertical pattern fills for chart styling
Providing decorative backgrounds for data visualization components
ai_summary: A minimal SVG pattern generator component that creates reusable line patterns (diagonal, horizontal, vertical) using CSS variables. Exports PatternLines for use in funnel chart visualizations, supporting customizable stroke colors, widths, and pattern orientations as a foundational decorative element.
